title: Furnaces Reimagined
body: ![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/65173c670722ca92055ed0563e405427.png) ![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png) ## This pack is originally from my pack [Minecraft Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined) but I thought some people may like it but not my pack, so I decided to give it, it's standalone pack! Isn't it weird how a furnace that is capable of smelting metals don't feel very hot? Let alone the fact that the furnace simply uses a static fire texture rather than it being fully animated? Well Furnaces Reimagined does just that and more! It remakes the furnace into a more logical and classic type of stone furnace in it's texture, while still trying to keep that vanilla look we all know and love, while at the same time making it 3D in a quite vanilla friendly way with a fully animated fire when it's turned on! ![Furnaces](https://i.gyazo.com/f07d3166e12dd265d22a371caf8d3e71.gif) IF YOU ARE USING SODIUM, DOWNLOADING THE POLYTONE MOD IS HEAVILY RECOMMENDED FOR BETTER VISUALS!    ![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png) [![Discord](https://i.gyazo.com/27c2c5a92a9c063d5d71e74afaabc22d.png)](https://discord.gg/rstmkrGeFJ) ![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png) [![Ad](https://i.gyazo.com/5a2618c30403aaceb78a5bceb2b8efd2.png)](https://partners.shockbyte.com/reimagined) Want to support Reimagined? For no extra cost, I get a part of the revenue via the purchases made through [this](https://partners.shockbyte.com/reimagined) link
